summary: Completed full testing of CryptonAI Homepage Redesign. Login working with provided credentials, all 6 menu options visible and navigable, crypto prices and news API functional, news category filtering working.

minor.issue: CoinGecko API returns 429 (rate limited), falling back to MOCK data - this is expected behavior

issues: Progress shows '108% complété' which seems incorrect - likely the total modules count doesn't match the user's completed modules

action_items: Consider reviewing progress calculation logic - shows 108% which indicates more modules completed than total expected
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user jcuradeau.7@gmail.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage redesign complete. All 6 menu items work (Marché, Apprendre, Communauté, Assistant IA, Mon Profil, Administration). News API returns MOCKED data but functional. Category filtering for news works. Crypto prices use mock data due to CoinGecko rate limits. Admin panel accessible for super_admin users.

tests_performed.description: Successfully logged in with jcuradeau.7@gmail.com / JacksoN12.
Hero header shows user name, level badge (Avancé), progress bar
BTC, ETH, USDT, Global market cap displayed horizontally
All 6 menu items visible: Marché, Apprendre, Communauté, Assistant IA, Mon Profil, Administration
Navigates to /learn showing courses and progress
Navigates to /community showing discussions and wiki tabs
Navigates to /ai showing AI chat interface with suggestions
Navigates to /admin showing user management panel (super_admin only)
Actualités Crypto shows news with images, titles, impact badges, sources, tags
Tout, Macro, Institutionnel, Tech, Régulation, Sécurité filters visible and clickable
Returns news with categories, impact, images - MOCKED data
Returns crypto prices - MOCKED due to CoinGecko rate limits
Login works, returns user with super_admin role

mocked_apis_note: APIs /api/crypto/prices, /api/crypto/global, and /api/news return MOCKED data. This is functional but not live data from external sources.
